sections.heading: 1. Cancellation by Guest
sections.content:
All cancellation requests must be submitted in writing to hello@seazen.com. The cancellation date is the date on which SeaZen receives written notice.

More than 90 days: Full refund of deposit (less €150 admin fee)
60–90 days: 50% of total rental fee refunded
30–59 days: 25% of total rental fee refunded
Less than 30 days: No refund

sections.heading: 2. Cancellation by SeaZen
sections.content: In the unlikely event that SeaZen must cancel a confirmed reservation, guests will receive a full refund of all amounts paid. SeaZen will make every effort to suggest alternative dates or a property.

sections.heading: 3. Force Majeure
sections.content: SeaZen shall not be liable for cancellations caused by events beyond its reasonable control, including natural disasters, governmental restrictions, or pandemic-related travel bans. In such cases, SeaZen will offer a credit or rescheduling wherever possible.

sections.heading: 4. Travel Insurance
sections.content: We strongly recommend that all guests purchase comprehensive travel insurance that covers cancellation, curtailment, and personal liability.

sections.heading: 5. Changes to Booking
sections.content: Date changes are subject to availability and must be requested in writing. A €75 amendment fee applies. Changes within 30 days of arrival are treated as a cancellation and re-booking.

sections.heading: 6. Contact
sections.content: For cancellations or amendments, please contact us at stay@seazen.es or whatsapp +34 646 37 42 79
